  'headline': '3 Value Stocks We Steer Clear Of',
  'publisher': 'StockStory',
  'summary': 'Value stocks typically trade at discounts to the broader market, '

  'headline': 'Ally Faces SEC Penalty As Shareholders Weigh Stronger Special '

  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'Ally Financial (NYSE:ALLY) has received an SEC penalty related '
             'to undisclosed profit practices in its robo advisor product, '
             'focusing on how client cash was allocated. Shareholders are also '
             'set to vote on a proposal to allow investors holding 10% of '
             'shares to call special meetings, which would change current '
             'governance rules. These developments arrive with Ally Financial '
             'shares trading at $39.52. The stock is up 5.8% over the past '

  'headline': '1 Financials Stock for Long-Term Investors and 2 That '

  'publisher': 'StockStory',
  'summary': 'Financial providers use their expertise in capital allocation '
